changes: Build Dashboard: code signing support — signs compiled app exe and installer with SHA-256 + RFC-3161 timestamp via signtool.exe
Build Dashboard: user-level install by default (no UAC prompt); PrivilegesRequiredOverridesAllowed=dialog lets end users still choose all-users install
Build Dashboard: registry entries now use HKA (auto-selects HKLM or HKCU) so uninstall works correctly for both admin and user-level installs
Build Dashboard: test install pipeline now runs installer elevated via PowerShell Start-Process -Verb RunAs to handle admin-mode installers
Build Dashboard: Nuitka compilation no longer fails when the target project has no templates/ or static/ directories
Build Dashboard: security scan tube no longer false-positives on Nuitka's own output lines
Build Dashboard: bundle tube stage detection now triggers on Nuitka-Options: prefix so stage activates before any fatal errors are emitted
Build Dashboard: Code Signing card added to Installer Options page with PFX browse, password, and timestamp server fields
Build Dashboard: Installer Options labels updated to clarify user-level vs admin install behaviour
Documentation: Code Signing section added to builder_help.html with certificate type comparison table
Initial release
Job Tracker dashboard with metric cards and scan status
Job listings with skill-based match scoring
Applications tracker with status workflow
Analytics with charts and source breakdown
Job source scraper management
Email notification system with SMTP support
Unemployment claim week tracker
Scheduler daemon for automated scans
Build Dashboard (port 5001) for git, build, and deploy
Customer Support page with bug reporting and feature requests
Dark / light mode with per-page persistence
Help & Documentation page
GitHub integration in Build Dashboard (auth, repo picker, PR management)
Local backup with robocopy and schedule support
Version control system with auto-increment on Full Build
